title: pinus kesiya subsp. yunnanensis
intro: Pinus kesiya subsp. yunnanensis, also known as Yunnan fir, is a subspecies of coniferous tree native to the mountains of Yunnan Province in China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Yunnan fir include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Pinus kesiya subsp. yunnanensis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
